channel.title: Knowledge Recorder Updates
channel.description: Signed macOS updates for Knowledge Recorder.

item.description:
macOS
- Automatic three-second signal test after selecting a meeting or dictation microphone, including the selected device name and clear signal/no-signal feedback. - One-click recovery to the system default and a shortcut for using the meeting microphone for dictation. - Missing USB, Bluetooth or virtual devices are repaired safely at recording start instead of failing on a stale endpoint. - Chat clearing is now visually and textually distinct from recoverable note deletion.
Windows
- Automatic three-second signal test for meeting, dictation and screen-video microphone selectors, verified on Grey Iron with real audio hardware. - One-click recovery to the system default plus workflow-specific diagnostics for connected but silent devices. - Meeting recording, dictation, chat voice input and screen video now recover safely when a selected endpoint disappears. - Chat clearing is now explicitly distinct from notes and recordings that move to the Recycle Bin.
SHA256
- DesktopRecorder-macOS.dmg: `CBDC436CCFCFAD7A8E05B113E8542341E9224FAEC934E0BD99BD0F9AB2FD221F` - DesktopRecorder.exe: `273CBB84C18FE467D551D19C098E26CA4289945FBF58A67A5BF22E54B9ABF180` - DesktopRecorder-Setup.exe: `1FC9598093A5EEB95057EA5083A112E3E4336F8D2D18869E3F94AF6CB9CD3973`

Knowledge Recorder 1.1.43 for macOS and Windows.
## macOS
- Native one-click updates now check, download, verify and install through a signed Sparkle feed. - Installation waits until meeting recording, dictation, screen capture and pending processing are idle before restarting the app.
## Windows
- Updates now download inside Knowledge Recorder with visible progress, SHA-256 validation and an Authenticode publisher check for BIK GmbH. - The verified installer cleanly closes the tray app, installs silently and launches Knowledge Recorder again.
SHA256:
- `4d35b46221e97c95e562d26b36e1d95073ed2b62d0a6b3914bb2d112ec412b92` `DesktopRecorder-macOS.dmg` - `6d06839807947a674209896d1d6a3a44b744ebaa31998abc82cf9e70c6c40a08` `DesktopRecorder.exe` - `54bf1d2bafd1771e9352289a5451150ce7473686479beef5f55f1dfaa3fec1bf` `DesktopRecorder-Setup.exe`
